# Short Video Agent Kit

Agent-first short-form AI video generation CLI and MCP server. One unified interface for OpenAI Sora, Google Gemini Veo, xAI Grok, and Seedance/PiAPI.

Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/short-video-agent-kit
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/short-video-agent-kit
Docs: https://github.com/davidmosiah/short-video-agent-kit#readme
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=short-video-agent-kit -- short-video-agent-kit doctor
MCP command: short-video-mcp

Core tools:
- short_video_agent_manifest — runtime contract, tool list, supported clients
- short_video_connection_status — provider availability, API keys present, dry-run mode
- short_video_capabilities — per-provider feature matrix (resolution, duration, audio)
- short_video_privacy_audit — what is logged locally vs sent to providers
- short_video_build_payload — turn a natural-language brief into a provider-ready request
- short_video_generate — submit a generation job to the chosen provider
- short_video_list_jobs — list recent generation jobs and their status
- short_video_get_job — fetch a single job (poll until done, get download URL)

Provider env vars (set the ones you have, others are skipped):
- OPENAI_API_KEY — for Sora
- GOOGLE_API_KEY — for Gemini Veo
- XAI_API_KEY — for xAI Grok video
- PIAPI_API_KEY — for Seedance via PiAPI
- SHORT_VIDEO_DRY_RUN=true — default; set to false (or pass live=true) to spend credits
- SHORT_VIDEO_DEFAULT_PROVIDER — sora|veo|grok|seedance, optional

Workflow for agents:
1. Call short_video_connection_status to see which providers are available.
2. Use short_video_capabilities to pick the right provider for the request (duration, resolution, audio).
3. Build the payload with short_video_build_payload (deterministic, no LLM call).
4. Confirm the brief + estimated cost with the user.
5. Call short_video_generate with explicit live=true to actually spend credits.
6. Poll short_video_get_job until the video URL is ready.

Safety:
- API keys stored locally, never returned in tool output.
- Dry-run on by default; paid generation requires live=true or SHORT_VIDEO_DRY_RUN=false.
- Cost estimates surfaced before submission so agents can warn the user.
- Generated videos default to containsSyntheticMedia disclosure when posted downstream.
- Not affiliated with or endorsed by OpenAI, Google, xAI, or PiAPI.
